cv_text: Backend engineer, 5 yrs. Python + Go microservices on AWS. Designed REST and gRPC APIs serving 20k rps. Postgres schema design, query optimization, on-call for production incidents. Built Kafka event pipeline for order processing. Docker + Kubernetes.

Frontend developer, 4 yrs. React + TypeScript SPA work. Built a design system with Storybook, accessibility (WCAG AA), Redux state management, Playwright e2e tests. Cut bundle size 40%. Some Node BFF glue but focus is the client.

ML engineer, 3 yrs. PyTorch model training for recommendation, offline + online eval, feature pipelines in Python. Shipped a ranking model to prod with A/B testing. MLflow experiment tracking. Fine-tuned a BERT classifier.
Data engineer, 6 yrs. SQL expert, dbt + Airflow ELT into Snowflake. Built ingestion from 30+ sources, Spark batch jobs, data quality monitoring. Dimensional modeling. Python for orchestration.

Full-stack engineer, 4 yrs. React/TypeScript front end AND Node/Express + Postgres back end. Owns features end to end. Designed REST APIs, built dashboards. Comfortable with Docker and CI/CD. Primary strength and most of my work is server-side API and database design; UI is secondary.

Applied scientist. Strong Python, pandas, scikit-learn. Lots of SQL and built ETL pipelines in Airflow to feed models. Trained gradient-boosted models, did feature engineering and evaluation. The role I want is modeling, not pipeline plumbing — my core is ML model development.

Junior dev, 1 yr bootcamp + internship. Built a couple of React todo apps and a small Flask API. Knows HTML/CSS/JS basics, a little Python. No production experience, no databases at scale. Eager to learn front-end work.
Backend engineer, 7 yrs. Java + Spring, designed high-throughput payment APIs, sharded MySQL, Redis caching, ran services on Kubernetes. Deep production debugging and incident response. No front-end.
Graphic designer pivoting to tech. Knows Figma, some HTML/CSS, copied a few JavaScript snippets. No programming role experience, no framework knowledge, no databases. Wants a UI job.

Data scientist, 2 yrs. Mostly notebooks: SQL queries, pandas analysis, dashboards in Tableau. Some scikit-learn experiments but never shipped a model to production. Strong with data warehousing concepts, dbt models, and ELT. Wants a data engineering role building pipelines.

ML researcher, PhD. Published on transformers, trained large models on GPU clusters, deep eval methodology, PyTorch internals. Limited production/serving experience but strong modeling. Wants ML engineering.
Sales engineer. Demoed software, wrote some SQL reports, light Python scripting for automation. No software engineering role, no API or pipeline building experience. Curious about data engineering.
Frontend engineer, 6 yrs. Vue and React, micro-frontends, performance budgets, SSR with Next.js, accessibility audits, component libraries. Mentors juniors. No backend ownership.

Backend-leaning platform engineer, 5 yrs. Go services, gRPC, Postgres, Kafka, Terraform, Kubernetes operators. Also dabbles in a React internal tool occasionally. Core work is backend services and infra.
Recent grad. Did a university ML project (image classifier in PyTorch) and a database course. No internship, no production code, thin portfolio. Applying broadly for ML roles.

Analytics engineer, 4 yrs. Lives in SQL and dbt, builds and tests transformation models in Snowflake, Airflow scheduling, owns the warehouse semantic layer. Python for tooling. Strong data engineering profile.
Mobile (iOS) developer, 5 yrs. Swift, UIKit, App Store releases. Strong client engineering but native mobile only — no web framework, no React/Vue, no backend services or databases at scale.

LLM engineer, 3 yrs. Builds RAG and agent systems, Python, vector databases, prompt engineering, evaluation harnesses, fine-tuning with LoRA. Ships NLP features to production with monitoring. Core is ML/LLM modeling and eval.
